# DayDrop: Countdowns
> The only iOS countdown app with AI-generated event backgrounds that sync to Apple Watch, Dynamic Island Live Activity with progress ring, 10 widget placements, and countdown to the exact moment.

## About
DayDrop is an iOS countdown widget app for iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch. It helps users track important dates with AI-generated photo backgrounds, Dynamic Island Live Activities, and 10 widget placements across every iOS surface. Built by indie developer Hirak Banerjee.

## Key Features (v1.5)
- AI-Generated Event Backgrounds: Describe your event and get a unique AI-created image; also syncs to Apple Watch
- Dynamic Island Live Activity with Progress Ring: Real-time countdown (days/hours/minutes/seconds) plus visual progress on Dynamic Island and Lock Screen
- Countdown to the Exact Moment: Set a specific time on any event and watch it tick down live
- 10 Widget Placements: 4 Home Screen sizes (Small, Medium, Large, ExtraLarge), Multi-Event widget in Medium and Large with progress bars, 2 Lock Screen widgets (circular + rectangular), StandBy, Control Center, Apple Watch complications
- Apple Watch App with AI: Full Watch app with AI event backgrounds synced from paired iPhone via WatchConnectivity
- iPad Optimized: Adaptive layouts, ExtraLarge widget, context menus, roomier overview
- Full-Screen Event Detail: Immersive countdown view with parallax background
- Orbital Year View: See your whole year of countdowns in a single circular timeline
- Image Opacity Control: Fine-tune how your event photos appear
- Birthday Import: Pull birthdays from Contacts with duplicate detection
- iCloud Sync: All countdowns sync across iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and Mac
- 16 Languages: Full interface localization
- Smart Notifications: Reminders at 30, 14, 7, 3, and 0 days
- Badge Countdown: See days remaining right on the app icon
- Share Cards: Export countdown cards to Instagram, iMessage, anywhere

## Pricing
- Free: Unlimited countdowns, basic widgets, photo backgrounds
- Monthly ($1.99/month)
- Annual ($12.99/year): AI backgrounds (iPhone + Watch), all 10 widget placements, Live Activity with progress ring, multi-event widget, exact-time countdown, premium share cards, iCloud sync (1-month free trial)
- Lifetime ($24.99): Everything, forever
- Regional pricing available in 30+ countries including India, Philippines, Vietnam, Brazil, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, and more

- Support: https://daydrop.beatroot.dev/support.html

## Use Cases
- Countdown to birthdays and anniversaries
- Vacation and trip countdowns
- Wedding countdown widgets
- Exam and deadline tracking
- Goal and milestone tracking
- Holiday countdowns (Christmas, New Year, etc.)
- Baby due date countdowns
- Sobriety and milestone counters (count up)
- Apple Watch countdowns with AI-generated backgrounds

## What Makes DayDrop Unique (vs Pretty Progress, Countdown Star, Countdown, Big Days)
- Only countdown app with AI-generated backgrounds per event
- Only countdown app with AI backgrounds synced to Apple Watch
- Only countdown app with Live Activity progress ring
- Largest widget placement count in category (10 placements)
- Countdown to the exact second — not just days

## Entity Information
- Developer: Hirak Banerjee
- Platform: iOS 18+, iPadOS 18+, watchOS 11+
- Category: Utilities / Productivity
- Rating: 4.8/5 stars
- Current Version: 1.5
- Twitter: @hirak8
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6759470132

## Technical
- Built with: SwiftUI, WidgetKit, ActivityKit, SwiftData, WatchConnectivity
- Requirements: iOS 18.0+, iPadOS 18.0+, watchOS 11.0+
- iCloud sync via CloudKit
- Privacy: no user data collection, no ads, AI image generation happens via secure API with user consent
